function.name: create_booking
function.description: Create a calendar booking for the customer with the appropriate healthcare agent. Use this when a customer wants to schedule an appointment, consultation, or meeting. Always confirm the date, time, and contact details before creating the booking.

attendee_name.description: Full name of the person booking the appointment

attendee_phone.description: Phone number of the attendee in E.164 format (e.g., +1234567890)

start.description: Start time of the appointment in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2025-01-15T15:00:00Z)

end.description: End time of the appointment in ISO 8601 format (e.g., 2025-01-15T16:00:00Z)

eventTypeId.description: The Cal.com event type ID for this booking. Use 3182186 for Jessica (healthcare), 3182183 for Laura (restaurant), or 3182184 for Paul (real estate)

notes.description: Optional notes or special requests for the appointment

response.success_message: Great! I've successfully created your booking. You should receive a confirmation email shortly with all the details. Is there anything else I can help you with?
response.error_message: I apologize, but I wasn't able to create that booking. This could be due to a scheduling conflict or an issue with the provided information. Would you like to try a different time slot?
